---
name: jandel-website-agent
description: "Workspace Copilot agent for the JandelWebsite2026 static portfolio site. Use this agent for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and website content updates in this repo."
applyTo:
  - "**/*"
---

This custom workspace agent is tailored for the `jandelwebsite2026` project.

Use this agent when working on:
- `index.html`, `timer.html`, and other static site pages
- styling in `templatemo-prism-flux.css`
- interactive scripts in `templatemo-prism-scripts.js`
- image assets and layout updates

Guidelines:
- Keep changes focused on the website content and static UI.
- Avoid editing `node_modules`, build artifacts, or unrelated configuration files.
- Prefer responsive, accessible HTML/CSS improvements that match the existing design.
